chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA No.325 of 2019 Ghulam Muhammad Banglani VS M/s. Plaza Enterprises Ltd. & others --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Hg Case (Priority) 1. For orders on CMA no: 3498/2019 2. For orders on office objective as at “A” 3. For hg of main case (Statement filed by Adv: for appellant) 26.4.2024 Mr. Muhammad Ramzan Tabbasum, Advocate for the Appellant ********** This matter was kept aside as counsel for the appellant left the “chit” with court associate of this court requesting therein that matter be kept aside as appellant wants to withdraw the appeal and he is busy before another bench. Now he has appeared and filed a statement to withdrawn this appeal. Earlier to this a statement dated 28-03-2022 was filed by the appellant to withdraw the appeal. Hence in view of above appeal stand dismissed as withdrawn. JUDGE JUDGE
